##STATUS=The identification of this mineral is confirmed by single-crystal X-ray diffraction and chemical analysis

##MEASURED CHEMISTRY=Si_1.00_O_2_·0.11H_2_O ; trace amounts of Al and Na  H_2_O by difference, verified by Raman spectroscopy
